content.en:
Becoming a second-class invincible, the main body entered the Void Source Hall again, Ye Tian was not worried about his identity being discovered.

He was going to go to the Void Source Monument, and with his current points, it would be enough to comprehend for a long time.

Moreover, even if he went to the Void Source Monument, he could hide his identity, and the others only knew that there was a Void Divine Son who occupied a place for the Void Source Monument, but they didn't know who that Void Divine Son was.

So, Ye Tian took a hijacking mask that could hide his breath and put it on, and after waiting for some years, the last batch of Void Sons who had comprehended the Void Source Tablet came out.

"Enter!"

Ye Tian instantly followed the next batch of Void Sons into the space of the Void Source Monument.

......

"Machine Spirit, why didn't I enter?"

A child of the Void roared in the Void Source Temple.

He finally waited for a long time, and after collecting 500 points, it was finally his turn to visit the Void Source Monument, but he didn't expect the other nine Void Children to enter, leaving him alone.

At this time, the Void Source Palace's Instrument Spirit said, "A Void Divine Son has occupied your place, you can only wait for the next Great Tribulation Time!"

"What, Void Son !!"

The Child of the Void was stunned.

He knew the title of Void Divine Son, the demon who was above the Void Child, but he had never seen the Void Divine Son, and he even thought that the Void Divine Son did not exist.

But he never expected that a Void God Son appeared and occupied his place, and he needed to wait for one more time in the Great Tribulation Era.

Is this lucky, or unlucky?

In front of the Void Source Monument.

The other nine Void Sons saw Ye Tian, and their expressions changed slightly.

Before, ten Void Sons were waiting to enter, and there was no Ye Tian, but another Void Son, and it was impossible for that Void Son to suddenly put on a mask, because there was no need.

In other words, Ye Tian suddenly cut in line and entered here.

"He's the Void God!"

The idea came to the minds of the nine children of the void.

"Your Excellency is the Son of the Void?"

A Child of the Void asked.

Ye Tian ignored them, but entered a small space and began to comprehend the Void Source Monument.

Seeing that Ye Tian was so cold and wearing a mask, the other children of the void obviously didn't want to reveal their identities, because they didn't say anything, and they also went to visit the Void Source Monument.

This time, Ye Tian came here to comprehend the Void Source Monument, and the purpose was mainly several, the first was to comprehend more eternal rules, which would be of great benefit to the creation of Supreme Ancestral Techniques in the future, and the second was to continue to study the Endless Source Body.

Although he created the Endless Source Body, he only created the condensation method of the Endless Source Body, and the use of the Endless Source Body was very shallow, so he needed to continue to comprehend the Void Source Tablet, and try to combine the Endless Source Body with an invincible ancestral technique to exert a more powerful effect.

In a flash, a great catastrophe has passed.

The other nine Void Sons were all removed, leaving only Ye Tian alone.

There is no time limit for him to comprehend the Void Source Monument, if he wants to comprehend, he can continue to comprehend, unless there are multiple Void Divine Sons here at the same time, the time for the Void Divine Son's enlightenment will be limited.

And now, only Ye Tian, a Void Divine Son, is here to comprehend, so naturally he will not let Ye Tian leave.

Soon, the other nine Void Sons came here, and one of them was the Void Son who was occupied by Ye Tian last time.

This son of the void was not surprised at all to see that Ye Tian had already comprehended the Void Source Tablet here.

He had long known that a Void Divine Son had occupied his place, and it was very normal for this Void Divine Son to continue to meditate here.

But the other children of the void were stunned.

"Who is this Child of the Void?"

They wondered.

"He should be a Void God!" the Void Child, who knew the situation, summoned the other Void Sons.

"What, Void Divine Son!"

The nine Children of the Void were shocked.

Outside.

Nine Void Sons came out of the Void Source Tablet space, and soon began to advertise a Void God Son to comprehend the Void Source Tablet in the Void Source Temple, and the news spread quickly.

Suddenly, the children of the Void of the Eternal Heaven and Earth all knew.

Tianlin Realm.

The Akiba Genjin also inquired about the Void Divine Son's appearance in the Void Source Hall to comprehend the Void Source Monument.

"Void Divine Son, it's a pity that I am only a little short of becoming a Void Divine Son, but my Void Source Body is not perfect, and the foundation has been established and cannot be changed. "

"This Void Divine Son should be a new Void Divine Son, those ancient Void Divine Sons no longer look down on the opportunity of the Void Source Palace, for them, the greatest benefit of the Void Source Hall can be used to hurry. The Void Source Monument didn't help them much, and the Void Source Hall had no other chance. "

"Unless they can become the Void Lord of the Void Source Temple, they will have an amazing opportunity, but becoming the Lord of the Void is almost impossible to exist. "

Akiba Genjin knows a lot about the Void Divine Son, and even knows a Void Divine Son, the other party's strength is much stronger than him, so from the mouth of the Void Divine Son, he also learned the secret about the Void Divine Son.

The Void Source Hall is indeed one of the great opportunities of the Source Sea, but in the entire Source Sea, it is not for nothing that it is comparable to the Void Source Hall or even surpasses the Void Source Hall.

It's just that ordinary invincibles can't learn too much about the secrets of the Source Sea at all, and only the supreme can access many secrets.

The supreme one is the real starting point of the source sea.

---------------

Time passed one after another, and the children of the void who had comprehended the Void Source Monument had changed wave after wave, and Ye Tian had been here to comprehend, which made many sons of the void envious.

If it's them, where are there so many points!

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had already comprehended more than twenty Great Tribulation Periods, and at this time, his comprehension of the Eternal Rules had reached a terrifying level, and creating an invincible ancestral technique was as simple as creating an ordinary martial art for him.

He had already created countless Invincible Ancestral Techniques, and now that he had created Invincible Ancestral Techniques, it would not help him much.

After such a long period of enlightenment, his cultivation has not improved much, but he has reached perfect control over the Endless Source Body, and he can even combine the Invincible Ancestral Technique with the Endless Source Body to exert his most powerful strength.

"It's time to leave, it's just a waste of time to continue to meditate!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He went out from here and entered the Void Tower.

He needs a long battle to completely integrate his insights and gains.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

On this day, a big thing happened to the Terrans.
